challenge.fun.round10.3: 🔟 **Extended edition** — no one can say it was short 😏, That's what she said
challenge.fun.round10.4: 🔟 **Epic endurance** — 10 rounds to prove you don't give up easily 😉
challenge.fun.round10.5: 🔟 **Heroes' marathon** — 10 rounds to forge legends, don’t stop now! 🏆
challenge.fun.round10.6: 🔟 **Never-ending rounds** — like that show you can’t stop watching, keep the pace! 📺
challenge.fun.round10.7: 🔟 **Global odyssey** — 10 rounds across continents, where will Street View drop you today? 🌍
challenge.fun.round10.8: 🔟 **Decathlon challenge** — 10 stops on the map to crown you geography king 👑
challenge.fun.round10.9: 🔟 **Survival mode** — 10 rounds in a row, only real explorers reach the end 🧭
challenge.fun.round10.10: 🔟 **Non-stop world tour** — 10 rounds and no checked luggage ✈️🌍
challenge.fun.time10.2: ⚡ **Lightning mode** — blink and you've already picked 😅
challenge.fun.time10.4: ⚡ **Express intuition** — 10 seconds for your instincts to take over 🧠
challenge.fun.time10.5: ⚡ **Flash decision** — 10s and done, like a superhero in action! 🦸‍♂️
challenge.fun.time10.6: ⚡ **Turbo tick-tock** — count to 10 and pick, or the clock picks for you ⏰
challenge.fun.time10.7: ⚡ **Quick pin** — 10s to drop the pin before the map moves 🗺️
challenge.fun.time10.8: ⚡ **GPS intuition** — pick now or the globe will spin you around! 🔄
challenge.fun.time10.9: ⚡ **Instant decision** — 10s to read the world and nail the pin 🎯
challenge.fun.time10.10: ⚡ **Street View shock** — 10 seconds and the map is already judging you 😬🗺️
challenge.fun.fast10.8: 🔥 **No margin for error** — nail it or fail 💥
challenge.fun.medium10.2: ⏱️ **Medium speed** — not a sprint, not a walk
challenge.fun.calm10.2: 😌 **Take it easy** — time to think clearly
challenge.fun.relax10.3: 🧘 **No clock pressure** — just you and the map 🗺️

Thanks as well to everyone who played **all challenges (7/7)**:
{perfectLine}

link.invalidGeoIdFormat: That GeoGuessr ID doesn’t look valid (copy the userId, not the nickname).
link.geoIdAlreadyLinkedToOtherDiscord: That GeoGuessr ID is already linked to another Discord user. If this is a mistake, ask an admin to review it.
link.discordAlreadyLinkedToOtherGeoId: Your Discord is already linked to another GeoGuessr ID ({otherGeoId}). If you want to change it, ask an admin to reset it.
link.geoIdNotLinked: That GeoGuessr ID isn’t linked to any Discord account.
link.discordNotLinked: That Discord user isn’t linked to any GeoGuessr ID.
